title: Survival Pack
description: Survival Pack is a lightweight Vanilla+ modpack that enhances survival with better lighting, voice chat, performance boosts, and schematic tools — all without changing core gameplay. Perfect for players who want a smoother, cleaner survival experience.
body:
# Survival Pack — Lightweight Vanilla+ Survival Enhancer

**Survival Pack** is a streamlined, client-focused modpack designed to improve your vanilla Minecraft survival experience **without changing core gameplay**. It adds essential quality-of-life features, performance improvements, and communication tools that make survival smoother, more immersive, and more enjoyable — all while keeping the classic Minecraft vibe intact.

---

## Why Download Survival Pack?

If you love vanilla survival but want it to feel fresher and less frustrating, Survival Pack is the perfect choice. It doesn’t overwhelm you with complex mods or new mechanics — instead, it offers subtle, smart improvements that enhance gameplay in meaningful ways:

- **Better Lighting Control**: Easily toggle full brightness on and off to explore caves and dark areas without constantly placing torches.
- **Improved Performance**: Run Minecraft smoother with Sodium and Sodium Extra, optimized to boost FPS and reduce lag without sacrificing visuals.
- **Build Smarter**: Use Litematica to plan and build complex structures with schematic overlays, keeping your survival builds organized and efficient.
- **In-Game Voice Chat**: Communicate seamlessly with friends through proximity-based voice chat when playing on servers that support it — no extra apps required.
- **Lightweight & Client-Side**: This modpack runs great on most PCs and only needs to be installed on the client. Server-side installation is optional and only required for voice chat.

---

## What Does Survival Pack Add?

- Quality-of-life improvements that keep you focused on survival, not managing complicated mods.
- Tools to enhance building, exploring, and communicating.
- Performance boosts that help Minecraft run smoother and look better.
- An experience that stays true to Minecraft’s original spirit, with just enough enhancement to keep you engaged longer.

---

**Download Survival Pack today and rediscover Minecraft survival — simple, better, and made to enjoy. Personally, I just call it Ivis. beacuse it makes it more cute.**
~~~~
